ai_ambition: Use AI to help our lawyers review contracts faster and reduce time spent searching for precedents across our document archive
pain_points: Contract review takes 3-5 days per contract — lawyers spend most of this on standard clause identification
Junior lawyers spend 60% of their time on document search rather than billable work
Client reporting on matter progress is manual and takes partners 2 hours per week
existing_ai_initiatives: Tried a generic GPT integration 18 months ago — was not production-ready and was quietly shelved due to hallucination concerns
competitors_doing: Several Magic Circle firms have announced internal AI tools for contract review
